segments.text: He looked up and saw the rich people who were putting their gifts into the treasury.
He saw a certain poor widow casting in two small brass coins.
He said,
Truly I tell you, this poor widow put in more than all of them,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for all these put in gifts for God from their abundance, but she, out of her poverty, put in all that she had to live on.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As some were talking about the temple and how it was decorated with beautiful stones and gifts, he said,
As for these things which you see, the days will come in which there will not be left here one stone on another that will not be thrown down.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They asked him,
Teacher, so when will these things be? What is the sign that these things are about to happen?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He said,
Watch out that you don’t get led astray, for many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he,’ and, ‘The time is at hand.’ Therefore don’t follow them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When you hear of wars and disturbances, don’t be terrified, for these things must happen first, but the end won’t come immediately.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then he said to them,
Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: There will be great earthquakes, famines, and plagues in various places. There will be terrors and great signs from heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, delivering you up to synagogues and prisons, bringing you before kings and governors for my name’s sake.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It will turn out as a testimony for you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Settle it therefore in your hearts not to meditate beforehand how to answer,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom which all your adversaries will not be able to withstand or to contradict.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will be handed over even by parents, brothers, relatives, and friends. They will cause some of you to be put to death.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will be hated by all men for my name’s sake.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And not a hair of your head will perish.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “By your endurance you will win your lives.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation is at hand.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains. Let those who are in the middle of her depart. Let those who are in the country not enter therein.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For these are days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe to those who are pregnant and to those who nurse infants in those days! For there will be great distress in the land and wrath to this people.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They will fall by the edge of the sword, and will be led captive into all the nations. Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “There will be signs in the sun, moon, and stars; and on the earth anxiety of nations, in perplexity for the roaring of the sea and the waves;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: men fainting for fear and for expectation of the things which are coming on the world, for the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then they will see the Son of Man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when these things begin to happen, look up and lift up your heads, because your redemption is near.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He told them a parable.
See the fig tree and all the trees.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When they are already budding, you see it and know by your own selves that the summer is already near.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Even so you also, when you see these things happening, know that God’s Kingdom is near.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most certainly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all things are accomplished.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will by no means pass away.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “So be careful, or your hearts will be loaded down with carousing, drunkenness, and cares of this life, and that day will come on you suddenly.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For it will come like a snare on all those who dwell on the surface of all the earth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore be watchful all the time, praying that you may be counted worthy to escape all these things that will happen, and to st and before the Son of Man.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Every day Jesus was teaching in the temple, and every night he would go out and spend the night on the mountain that is called Olivet.
All the people came early in the morning to him in the temple to hear him.
